title: NBA Daily Digest: Offseason Heats Up with Major Trade & Summer League Crowns a Champ!
subtitle: July 20, 2026 Edition

items.headline: Blockbuster Three-Team Trade Sends Dort to Hawks, Risacher to Mavs
items.summary: In a significant offseason shake-up, the OKC Thunder have sent guard Luguentz Dort to the Atlanta Hawks. The Hawks, in turn, moved 2024 top overall NBA Draft pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Dallas Mavericks. The complex deal also saw former Dallas guard Ryan Nembhard head to Atlanta, while Oklahoma City acquired three second-round draft picks. This move is expected to save the Thunder $200 million in salary cap space, following earlier trades of Andrew Wiggins and Isaiah Joe.

items.headline: LeBron James Free Agency Saga Continues: Stars Make Their Pitches
items.summary: The NBA free agency market is currently on pause, eagerly awaiting LeBron James' decision on his next destination. Multiple stars are publicly pitching their teams to the four-time MVP, with James Harden from the 76ers and Anthony Edwards of the Timberwolves reportedly making their cases.

sections.title: Last Night's Games - Summer League Finals Wrap-Up

items.headline: Warriors Crowned Summer League Champions!
items.summary: The Golden State Warriors clinched the 2026 NBA Summer League championship, defeating the Memphis Grizzlies in a thrilling 94-90 final.

items.headline: Nets Dominate Thunder in Summer League Action
items.summary: The Brooklyn Nets secured a commanding 108-90 victory over the Oklahoma City Thunder in their Summer League matchup.

items.headline: Spurs Edge Suns in Tight Summer League Contest
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs took an 86-81 win against the Phoenix Suns in a hard-fought Summer League game.

items.headline: Yaxel Lendeborg Named Summer League MVP
items.summary: Warriors' rookie Yaxel Lendeborg was sensational in the Summer League Finals, leading Golden State to the championship with 21 points, 10 rebounds, two assists, and two steals, earning him MVP honors.
items.statContext: 21 PTS, 10 REB, 2 AST, 2 STL in Finals

items.headline: Deni Avdija's Pivotal Offseason with Blazers
items.summary: After a breakout 2025-26 season where he was an All-Star and averaged 22.2 points, 6.0 rebounds, and 4.6 assists in the playoffs, Israeli forward Deni Avdija faces an interesting offseason. The Blazers' recent acquisitions, including Ja Morant, Damian Lillard, and Jrue Holiday, create a crowded backcourt that could impact Avdija's significant point-forward role. Despite a regression in three-point shooting (31.8%) and 3.8 turnovers per game last season, Avdija led the league in assists after drives.

items.headline: John Ukomadu Leads Nets to Summer League Win
items.summary: John Ukomadu was a standout for the Brooklyn Nets in their Summer League victory over the Thunder, contributing a team-high 23 points, 9 rebounds, 3 three-pointers, and 2 steals.

items.headline: Lakers Face Uphill Battle for Restricted Free Agent Peyton Watson
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers are reportedly interested in Denver Nuggets' restricted free agent Peyton Watson, but insider Jake Fischer suggests they lack the necessary draft capital to make a competitive offer. This challenge intensified after the Lakers committed draft picks to acquire Walker Kessler. Watson is also being pursued by the Clippers, Hawks, and Bucks.

items.headline: 2026 NBA Summer League Concludes in Las Vegas
items.summary: The 2026 NBA Summer League, featuring teams battling it out in Las Vegas, officially concluded on July 19th, with the Golden State Warriors taking home the championship trophy.
